title: acourtia montana var. intermedia
intro: Acourtia montana var. intermedia, also known as the Intermediate Wedelia or Mountain Wedelia, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is a member of the Asteraceae family and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Acourtia montana var. intermedia can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal benefits.
